heading: Postmaster General; Deputy Postmaster General
label: 203 Postmaster General; Deputy Postmaster General
text: The chief executive officer of the Postal Service is the Postmaster General appointed under . The alternate chief executive officer of the Postal Service is the Deputy Postmaster General appointed under .section 202(c) of this titlesection 202(d) of this title
notes: Effective DateSection effective , see , set out as a note preceding .Aug. 12, 1970section 15(a) of Pub. L. 91–375section 101 of this title
